_meta.keyKnowledge: We learn about community and government initiatives that promote harmony and respect among people with diverse worldviews.

_source.w: We learn about community and government initiatives that promote harmony and respect among people with diverse worldviews.
y: Organised efforts to promote harmony demonstrate that social cohesion requires active work.
Understanding these initiatives shows us how societies manage diversity constructively.
This knowledge empowers us to contribute to harmony and respect in our own communities.
eg: We research Harmony Week and discuss how it promotes cultural understanding in Australia.
We investigate community programs that bring people of different backgrounds together.
We explore government policies that protect religious freedom and cultural diversity.
We discuss how reconciliation initiatives promote harmony between Aboriginal and Torres Strait Islander and non-Indigenous Australians.
We investigate how multicultural festivals and events promote respect and understanding.
We evaluate the effectiveness of different approaches to promoting social harmony.
